creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
Created attachment 224571
Patch for net-mgmt/icingaweb2-module-fileshipper/distinfo

Commit 63810dd7c02b568da2fca013af12bf1297fa349f missed distinfo. Attached patch should correct the issue.

root@[REDACTED]:/usr/ports/net-mgmt/icingaweb2-module-fileshipper # make fetch
===>  License GPLv2 accepted by the user
===>   icingaweb2-module-fileshipper-php74-1.2.0 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> icinga-icingaweb2-module-fileshipper-v1.2.0_GH0.tar.gz is not in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/icingaweb2-module-fileshipper/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/net-mgmt/icingaweb2-module-fileshipper/distinfo is out of date, or
=> icinga-icingaweb2-module-fileshipper-v1.2.0_GH0.tar.gz is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/icingaweb2-module-fileshipper
